---
title: "Aniruddha Girish Aramanekoppa"
---

# Introduction

Research Engineer in Planetary Science at the Paris Observatory

I work on detecting new exoplanets using astrometry, direct imaging and radial velocities.

## Research Interests

- Exoplanets
- Astrometry
- Direct Imaging
- Radial Velocity
- Transits
- Spectroscopy

## Contact

aniruddha ["dot"] aramanekoppa ["at"] obspm ["dot"] fr
